title: dryopteris disjuncta f. glandulosa
intro: Dryopteris disjuncta f. glandulosa is a subspecies of the Dryopteris disjuncta fern, a type of vascular plant that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris disjuncta f. glandulosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for use in herbal medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
